# Edang Law

> Edang Law is a law office based in Jordan, Guimaras, Philippines, providing legal services in criminal law, civil law, annulment, real estate law, and labor law. Founded by Atty. Rommel John Gabales Edang, a licensed attorney since 2017.

## About

Edang Law Office is a solo general practice serving individuals, families, and businesses with legal matters in Guimaras province. The office is located at 2nd Floor, JACQ Commercial Building, San Miguel, Jordan, Guimaras. Atty. Edang also serves as a commissioned Notary Public.

Contact: 0939 920 7932 | info@edanglaw.com
Office Hours: Monday to Saturday, 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM

## Practice Areas

- Criminal Law: Defense against criminal charges under the Revised Penal Code and special laws (homicide, theft, estafa, cybercrime, bail applications)
- Civil Law: Property disputes, contract disputes, collection of sum of money, ejectment, reconveyance
- Annulment: Declaration of nullity, annulment of voidable marriages, psychological incapacity under Article 36 of the Family Code, legal separation, custody
- Real Estate: Land title verification and transfer, deed of sale, extrajudicial settlement of estate, land disputes, lease agreements
- Labor Law: Illegal dismissal cases, unpaid wages, NLRC and DOLE complaints, employment contracts, workplace disputes
- Notarial Services: Notarization of deeds, affidavits, contracts, and other legal documents

## Attorney

Atty. Rommel John Gabales Edang
- Licensed attorney since 2017
- Former SB Member of Buenavista, Guimaras
- Current SP Member of the Province of Guimaras
- Commissioned Notary Public
- Former DENR and DAR staff

## Areas Served

Jordan, Buenavista, Nueva Valencia, San Lorenzo, Sibunag (all five municipalities of Guimaras), and clients from Iloilo and other areas with legal matters in Guimaras.
